description:
Authors: Jiang, B. and Xie, Y. and Hao, Z. and Wang, X. and Mallick, T. and Su, W. J. and Taylor, C. J. and Roth, D.
Title: A peek into token bias: Large language models are not yet genuine reasoners
Conference/Book: Proceedings of the 2024 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing
Year: 2024
reason: Multiple authoritative sources (ACL Anthology, arXiv, CrossRef, OpenAlex) confirm the paper's existence, authors, title, and publication at EMNLP 2024. The arXiv preprint explicitly states acceptance. Minor name formatting differences are normal.
